patches.rationale: Section 1.8 link used tab anchor (#part1) instead of section anchor (#p1-18). With showTab onclick, this opens the model tab but lands reader at top of Part 1 requiring manual scroll. Fix: use section anchor #p1-18 while keeping showTab for tab navigation. Source: WIN-016.c3.json Hole 4.

patches.find: Superconducting gravimeters of this generation have after tidal and atmospheric reduction, SG residuals reach the 0.1–1 µGal floor
patches.replace: After tidal and atmospheric reduction, SG residuals of this generation reach the 0.1–1 µGal floor
patches.rationale: H10 patch introduced dangling sentence fragment: 'Superconducting gravimeters of this generation have after tidal and atmospheric reduction, SG residuals reach the 0.1-1 µGal floor' — two fused sentences with missing predicate. Fix: strip the dangling lead-in per curmudgeon c5 Hole 1 recommendation. Source: WIN-014.c5.json.

patches.replace: no published English-language contact-phase residual analysis from the 2009 campaign has been located
patches.rationale: ISS-1828 H3-partial: 'no contact-phase anomaly was reported' is asymmetrically hedged — we hedge the source (Sun et al., attributed 2010) but assert the null finding without equivalent hedge. Replace with symmetric epistemological claim that matches how we hedge the source attribution. A defender will note the asymmetry between source hedge and finding claim. Source: WIN-014.c5.json Hole 4.
